_README: This is the canonical RASPA3-shape CO2 component definition for the MFI Henry-coefficient parity test. Numbers are the operator-public García-Sánchez 2009 / Potoff & Siepmann 2001 TraPPE-style 3-site rigid linear CO2 model that is referenced (but not redistributed-bundled) by widom-atlas. They appear here ONLY as test fixture data, mirroring the public RASPA3 example tree at iRASPA/RASPA3/examples/basic/12_mc_henry_coefficient_of_co2_n2_methane_in_mfi.
Name: CO2

Geometry._orientation: linear; C at origin; bond length 1.149 A

_provenance.comment: TraPPE-style numerical values from peer-reviewed literature (Potoff & Siepmann 2001 DOI 10.1002/aic.690470719; García-Sánchez 2009 DOI 10.1021/jp9035419). Used as TEST FIXTURE only. widom-atlas does not bundle this as a redistributable parameter table.
